features: NATURAL COTTON: Cotton Tree is hypoallergenic, made from 100% pure natural cotton, perfect for daily use. Large roll perfect for a busy household, leave rolls in bathrooms amd bedrooms
COSMETIC ESSENTIAL: Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make up cleansers, oils and powders. Remove make-up and nail polishes.
NATURAL COTTON: Hypoallergenic, made from 100% pure natural cotton, perfect for daily use

GENTLE CLEANSING: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directs to help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Convenient roll of soft cotton wool
description: Product Description 100% pure natural cotton Directions 1. Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make-up cleansers, oils, or powders to the cotton pad. 2. Gently rub the cotton pad on the desired area of the skin to cleanse or apply the product. 3. To remove make-up or nail polish, saturate the cotton pad with a suitable remover and gently wipe the affected area. Safety Warning keep away from flame. See more
